name: Ham and Vegetable Linguine
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound fresh asparagus, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook linguine according to package directions.
2. Meanwhile, in a large skillet, sauté asparagus, mushrooms, carrot, zucchini, and ham in butter until the vegetables are tender.
3. Add cream, peas, onions, Parmesan, basil, salt, pepper, and nutmeg; bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 3 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Drain linguine and add it to the vegetable mixture. Toss to coat.
6. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese if desired.
Yield: 4 servings
